ai.title: AI Object Removal

eyewear.subtitle: Virtually trial luxury frames

design.title: 1. Sovereign Design Principle
design.body: XingCam is built on a 100% Zero-Telemetry, offline-first foundation. We do not track you, we do not require accounts, and we do not sell your data.

storage.title: 2. Local Storage & Processing
storage.body: All your photos are stored and processed strictly on your local device. We never upload your media to any external servers or clouds.

ai.title: 3. On-Device AI & Biometrics
ai.body: Our AI runs entirely on your phone's processor. Features like Face Swap and Skin Beautifier analyze facial geometry temporarily to apply professional edits. This biometric data is explicitly NOT saved, stored, or transmitted. It is immediately destroyed from memory the moment you close the edit tool.

permissions.title: 4. App Permissions
permissions.body: We request Camera and Storage access solely to capture and save your beautiful edits. We do not access internet-based tracking APIs or background location.

analytics.title: 5. Diagnostic Analytics
analytics.body: Any crash logs or diagnostics are stored locally on your device. We use a sovereign Crashlytics service that never automatically sends crash data over the network.

contact.title: 6. Contact & Legal
contact.body: For GDPR, CCPA, or BIPA data inquiries, note that since we hold zero user data on servers, you maintain 100% control of your data on your physical device. Contact xingcam-legal@example.com for more info.

camera.permission_denied: Camera access denied. Please enable in Settings.

gallery.empty_subtitle: Start capturing retro moments with the camera!

collection.title: Collection Harmonizer
collection.tutorial_desc: Ensure aesthetic consistency across your photo series. Select a "Master" photo to sync exposure, temperature, and tint across the entire batch.

outfit.title: AI Outfit Studio
outfit.tutorial_desc: Reimagine your style with AI. Change your outfit to match any vibe or aesthetic automatically while preserving your identity.

text.title: Artistic Text Studio
text.tutorial_desc: Add artistic text to your photos. Choose from premium fonts, adjust size and color, and drag the text anywhere on your image.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe Sync
wardrobe.tutorial_desc: Synchronize your clothing with the film aesthetic. Select a harmonic color below to recolor your outfit for perfect chromatic unity.

teeth.title: Teeth Whitening
teeth.tutorial_desc: Achieve a bright, confident smile. Adjust the whitening level and naturalness blend for a realistic, camera-ready result.

mimic.title: AI Style Mimic
mimic.tutorial_desc: Upload any photo you find inspiring. AI will analyze its color grading and suggest a XingCam Recipe to match the look.

art.title: AI Style Art
art.tutorial_desc: Transform your photos into stunning artwork. Choose from Anime, Oil Painting, Ghibli, and more. Adjust intensity to blend styles naturally.

story.title: Story Templates
story.tutorial_desc: Create scroll-stopping Stories and TikTok content in seconds. Pick a template, add your caption, and share directly to your favorite platform.
story.caption: Add Caption

spot.title: AI Spot Remover
spot.tutorial_desc: Tap on blemishes, acne, or freckles to remove them instantly. Adjust smoothness for seamless blending with surrounding skin.

smart_crop.title: Smart Crop
smart_crop.tutorial_desc: Crop to the perfect ratio for every platform. Choose Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, or custom dimensions with one tap.

skin_tone.title: Skin Tone
skin_tone.tutorial_desc: Fine-tune your skin tone for the perfect aesthetic. Adjust brightness, warmth, and rosiness while AI preserves skin texture.

skin_beautifier.title: Skin Beautify
skin_beautifier.desc: AI is smoothing skin and enhancing radiance while preserving natural texture.

sculptor.title: AI Sculptor
sculptor.tutorial_desc: Reach perfection. Use Slenderize for face/body shaping and Dream Glow to add professional skin finishing.

mosaic.title: Mosaic Blur
mosaic.subtitle: Artistic pixelated privacy blur
mosaic.tutorial_desc: Easily hide sensitive information or create aesthetic depth by drawing mosaic or blur effects directly onto your photo.

bg_replace.title: Background Replace
bg_replace.subtitle: Change backdrops with AI
bg_replace.tutorial_desc: AI automatically segments your subject and replaces the background. Choose a preset or blur your background for a professional depth-of-field effect.

collage.title: Collage Maker
collage.subtitle: Combine photos into grids
collage.tutorial_desc: Create beautiful photo grids. Choose a layout, add your photos, and adjust spacing and corner radius for a polished social media grid.

memory.title: AI Memory Revive
memory.tutorial_desc: Breathe life into old memories. Use AI to upscale, sharpen, and restore the vibrant colors of your vintage photos.

makeup.title: Makeup Studio
makeup.tutorial_desc: Enhance your look with digital makeup. Apply lipstick and blush with AI precision and adjustable intensity.

magic_eraser.title: Magic Eraser
magic_eraser.paint_hint: Paint over the object you want to remove first.
magic_eraser.success: Sovereign AI: Object removed locally on device.
magic_eraser.tutorial_desc: Remove unwanted objects or photobombers with one swipe. Paint over what you want gone and let AI do the rest.

magic_brush.title: Magic Brush
magic_brush.tutorial_desc: Draw magical strokes onto your photos. Select a brush style and paint directly on the canvas to add artistic elements.

hair.title: AI Hair Colorist
hair.tutorial_desc: Try any hair color virtually. From natural shades to bold fantasy colors. Adjust intensity for a subtle highlight or dramatic transformation.

face_swap.title: AI Face Swap
face_swap.tutorial_desc: Swap faces seamlessly with our localized AI engine. Select a face in your photo and choose a target face to swap with.

ar_stickers.title: AR Stickers
ar_stickers.tutorial_desc: Drag and drop 3D-aware stickers onto your scene. They automatically adjust to the lighting and perspective of your photo.

borders.title: Artistic Borders
borders.tutorial_desc: Give your photos a professional finish with Polaroid frames, minimal borders, or dreamy film edges.

consent.title: Privacy & Protection
consent.desc:
To enable AI Portrait features, we analyze face landmarks temporarily. 

• Processing is 100% on-device.
• No biometric data is stored or sent to servers.
• Data is deleted immediately when closing the tool.
consent.compliance: XingCam complies with GDPR & BIPA standards.
